title: SHMI Overview
text: Soil Health Management Index (SHMI) provides quantitative, rotation‑scale assessment soil health management practices. integrates four biologically grounded pillars: Cover — seasonal plant presence Diversity — rotation-scale crop diversity (Hill numbers) Inverse Disturbance — mechanistic mixing-efficiency × depth metric Organic Inputs — amendments animal presence vignette provides complete walkthrough SHMI workflow using functions SHMI R package.

title: SHMI Overview
text: SHMI workflow begins standardized Excel workbook containing: Mgt_Unit Crop_Diversity Soil_Disturbance Amendment_Diversity Animal_Diversity function prepare_shmi_inputs(): reads validates sheets harmonizes crop windows constructs rotation bounds builds daily grids computes daily disturbance assembles amendment animal events returned object named list containing: rot_bounds crop_harmonized daily daily_dist amend animal additional metadata objects feed directly build_shmi().
code: # Example (replace with your file path) # inputs <- prepare_shmi_inputs("example.xlsx", verbose = TRUE)

title: SHMI Overview
text: inputs prepared, computing SHMI straightforward: output includes: Cover Diversity InvDist Animals SHMI (weighted composite) well : settings_used expert_mode timestamp shmi_version

title: SHMI Overview
text: default, SHMI uses official national settings (locked mode). explore scenarios conduct research, may override settings: expert_mode = TRUE, SHMI values comparable national SHMI scale.
code: custom <- list(   w_winter = 0.2,   w_spring = 0.2,   w_summer = 0.4,   w_fall   = 0.2 )  # shmi_exp <- build_shmi(inputs, settings = custom, expert_mode = TRUE)

title: SHMI Overview
text: section demonstrates pillar computed individually.

title: SHMI Overview
text: Cover based seasonal plant-days, normalized rotation length weighted seasonal importance.

title: SHMI Overview
text: Diversity uses Hill-number entropy metrics rotation scale, mixture expansion species-level plant-day aggregation.

title: SHMI Overview
text: Disturbance computed using mechanistic mixing-efficiency × depth model: cumulative mechanical energy profile penetration (Tₜ) annual aggregation rotation averaging scaling 0–100

title: SHMI Overview
text: Organic inputs combine amendment animal events using user-defined weights.

title: SHMI Overview
text: final SHMI score reflects: year-round cover crop diversity reduced soil disturbance organic inputs Higher SHMI values indicate management systems supportive soil health.

title: SHMI Overview
text: SHMI package provides fast, reproducible, biologically grounded framework quantifying soil health management across diverse systems. details, see: ?prepare_shmi_inputs ?build_shmi ?compute_cover ?compute_diversity ?compute_disturbance ?compute_orginput

title: SHMI Input Validation
text: SHMI uses two‑layer validation system ensure inputs structurally complete, biologically realistic, internally consistent SHMI pillars computed. prevents silent failures, protects malformed Excel files, guarantees reproducible SHMI scores. two validators: validate_excel_input() — runs ingestion checks raw Excel workbook. validate_shmi_input() — runs ingestion checks harmonized SHMI data list. validators run automatically inside SHMI workflow:
code: Excel Workbook       ↓ validate_excel_input()       ↓ prepare_shmi_inputs()       ↓ validate_shmi_input()       ↓ build_shmi()       ↓ SHMI Pillars + Composite Score

title: SHMI Input Validation
text: validate_excel_input() checks raw Excel workbook processing occurs.

title: SHMI Input Validation
text: following sheets must present: Mgt_Unit Crop_Diversity Soil_Disturbance Soil_Amendments Animal_Diversity Soil_Test Optional sheets: User_Info Dropdowns_Manual Missing required sheets cause immediate failure.

title: SHMI Input Validation
text: sheet must contain specific columns. Examples:

title: SHMI Input Validation
text: MGT_combo CD_seq_num CD_mix CD_cat CD_group CD_name CD_plant_date CD_harv_date CD_term_date

title: SHMI Input Validation
text: MGT_combo SD_phase SD_date SD_equip_cat SD_equip SD_mixeff SD_depth Missing columns produce hard errors.

title: SHMI Input Validation
text: date columns must valid Excel dates. Text dates mixed formats cause validation failure.

title: SHMI Input Validation
text: sheets must use set MGT_combo identifiers. Validation fails : sheet contains MGT_combo found Mgt_Unit sheet contains NA MGT_combo

title: SHMI Input Validation
text: CD_mix must : “”, valid mixture containing “+”, empty Malformed entries “++”, “Corn+”, “+Rye” produce warnings.

title: SHMI Input Validation
text: Blank partially blank rows detected reported.

code: validate_excel_input("my_shmi_file.xlsx") ❌ Excel input validation failed. Errors:  - Sheet Crop_Diversity is missing required columns: cd_term_date  - Sheet Soil_Disturbance contains NA MGT_combo values

title: SHMI
text: SHMI R package provides complete, reproducible workflow computing Soil Health Management Index (SHMI) standardized Excel workbooks. SHMI integrates four management pillars: Cover — seasonal plant presence Diversity — rotation-scale crop diversity (Hill numbers) Inverse Disturbance — mechanistic mixing-efficiency × depth metric Organic Inputs — amendments animal presence package includes: robust Excel ingestion validation biologically realistic crop-window harmonization fast vectorized daily-grid construction mechanistic disturbance modeling rotation-scale aggregation official national SHMI settings (locked mode) expert-mode overrides research scenario analysis

title: SHMI
text: Agricultural management multidimensional, many soil health indicators respond long‑term patterns rather single‑year practices. SHMI provides: rotation‑scale measure management intensity standardized, reproducible workflow diverse datasets transparent scoring system grounded ecological function consistent template data entry QA/QC Tools help researchers practitioners compare systems, evaluate interventions, link management soil outcomes

title: SHMI
text: Install development version GitHub:

title: SHMI
text: complete SHMI workflow just lines
code: library(SHMI)  # 1. Retrieve the Excel template template <- get_shmi_template()  # 2. Prepare inputs (validates structure and expands events) df <- prepare_shmi_inputs(template)  # 3. Compute pillar scores and SHMI result <- build_shmi(df)  head(result)

title: SHMI
text: SHMI template enforces required column names, date formats, sheet structure. prepare_shmi_inputs() performs full validation return clear, actionable error messages anything missing incorrectly formatted.
code: library(SHMI)  # Get a blank SHMI template blank_file <- get_shmi_template()  # (1) Open the template in Excel # (2) Fill in your management data # (3) Save it as "my_shmi_inputs.xlsx"  user_file <- "path/to/my_shmi_inputs.xlsx"  # Prepare inputs inputs <- prepare_shmi_inputs(user_file)  # Compute SHMI shmi <- build_shmi(inputs)  shmi$indicator_df

title: SHMI
text: SHMI provides structured, end‑‑end workflow: get_shmi_template() get_shmi_example() Validates required columns Expands crop windows daily resolution Summarizes disturbance organic inputs Harmonizes dates management events prepare_shmi_inputs() Cover compute_cover() Diversity compute_diversity() Disturbance compute_disturbance() Organic inputs compute_orginput() build_shmi()

what: Build SHMI Scores from Prepared Inputs — build_shmi
title: Build SHMI Scores from Prepared Inputs — build_shmi
text: Computes Soil Health Management Index (SHMI) management unit (`MGT_combo`) using harmonized inputs produced prepare_shmi_inputs(). SHMI weighted composite four pillars: cover, diversity, inverse disturbance, organic inputs (amendments + animals). default, function uses official national SHMI settings (locked mode). expert mode, users may override settings, resulting scores longer comparable national SHMI scale.

title: Build SHMI Scores from Prepared Inputs — build_shmi
Build SHMI Scores from Prepared Inputs — build_shmi
text: shmi_inputs list returned prepare_shmi_inputs(), containing minimum: rot_bounds — rotation start/end dates crop_harmonized — harmonized crop windows daily — daily crop presence table daily_dist — daily disturbance table amend — amendment events animal — animal events settings Optional named list SHMI settings (seasonal cover weights, Hill number, max diversity, pillar weights, etc.). Ignored unless expert_mode = TRUE. Missing elements filled official defaults. expert_mode Logical; FALSE (default), SHMI computed using official national settings custom settings ignored. TRUE, custom settings allowed resulting SHMI values comparable national SHMI scale.

title: Build SHMI Scores from Prepared Inputs — build_shmi
text: list : indicator_df — data frame columns:       MGT_combo, SHMI, Cover, Diversity,       InvDist, Animals settings_used — settings actually applied expert_mode — logical flag shmi_version — version string reproducibility timestamp — computation time

title: Build SHMI Scores from Prepared Inputs — build_shmi
text: SHMI computation proceeds five stages: Settings:     locked mode, official national SHMI settings always used.     expert mode, user-supplied settings override defaults. Input validation:     Ensures required elements prepare_shmi_inputs()     present. Pillar computation: Cover — via compute_cover() Diversity — via compute_diversity() Inverse disturbance — via compute_disturbance() Organic inputs — via compute_orginput() Weighted combination:     Pillars normalized weights sum 1, combined     single SHMI score:     $$       SHMI = w_{cover} \cdot Cover +              w_{div}   \cdot Diversity +              w_{dist}  \cdot InvDist +              w_{ani}   \cdot Animals     $$ Output assembly:     Returns tidy data frame SHMI scores along metadata describing     settings used computation timestamp. Additionally, computing SHMI pillars, function automatically validates internal SHMI data list using validate_shmi_input(). validator checks structural completeness (e.g., required tables, required columns, valid date types, duplicated daily rows, missing MGT_combo values) ensures harmonized data produced prepare_shmi_inputs() consistent ready SHMI computation. validation fails, execution stops immediately explicit error messages. Users must correct input data Excel file re-running build_shmi().

what: Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_avg_annual_disturbance
title: Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_avg_annual_disturbance
text: Calculates SHMI disturbance pillar management unit (`MGT_combo`) using mechanistic soil-mixing model based mixing efficiency tillage depth. Disturbance computed *annual* scale averaged across rotation. final inverse-disturbance score scaled 0–100.

title: Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_avg_annual_disturbance
Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_avg_annual_disturbance
text: daily_dist daily disturbance table produced prepare_shmi_inputs(), containing: MGT_combo — management unit identifier date — calendar date SD_mixeff — mixing efficiency (0–1) SD_depth_cm — tillage depth cm (already capped 30) rot_bounds data frame rotation bounds management unit, containing: MGT_combo rot_start rot_end

title: Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_avg_annual_disturbance
text: data frame : MGT_combo InvDist — inverse disturbance score (0–100)

title: Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_avg_annual_disturbance
text: Disturbance computed using mechanistic soil-mixing model: Depth normalization:     Tillage depth converted cm capped 30 cm. Annual ordering:     Within year, disturbance events ordered depth mixing     efficiency. Cumulative mechanical energy:     $$ ME_i = SD\_mixeff_i \times SD\_depth\_cm_i $$     $$ cumME_i = \sum_{j < } ME_j $$ Profile penetration (T_t):     $$ T_{t,} = SD\_mixeff_i \times \max(0, SD\_depth\_cm_i - cumME_i) $$     $$ T_{t,}^{norm} = T_{t,} / 30 $$ Annual disturbance:     $$ T_t^{annual} = \sum_i T_{t,}^{norm} $$ Inverse disturbance:     $$ T_t^{inv} = 1 - T_t^{annual} $$ Rotation average:     Annual inverse disturbance averaged across rotation years     scaled 0–100. management unit disturbance events, inverse disturbance defined 100 (disturbance).

what: Compute the SHMI Cover Pillar (Season‑Weighted Plant Presence) — compute_cover
title: Compute the SHMI Cover Pillar (Season‑Weighted Plant Presence) — compute_cover
text: Calculates SHMI cover indicator management unit (`MGT_combo`) using daily crop presence data rotation bounds. Cover computed weighted average seasonal plant‑days, season (winter, spring, summer, fall) contributes user‑specified weight. Seasonal plant‑days normalized expected number days per season (one‑quarter rotation length), final cover score scaled 0–100.

title: Compute the SHMI Cover Pillar (Season‑Weighted Plant Presence) — compute_cover
code: compute_cover(   daily,   rot_bounds,   w_winter = 0.25,   w_spring = 0.25,   w_summer = 0.25,   w_fall = 0.25 )

title: Compute the SHMI Cover Pillar (Season‑Weighted Plant Presence) — compute_cover
text: daily daily data frame produced prepare_shmi_inputs(), containing least: MGT_combo — management unit identifier date — calendar date crop_present — 1 crop present, 0 otherwise CD_name — crop name (used treat "fallow" 0 cover) rot_bounds data frame rotation start end dates MGT_combo, containing: MGT_combo rot_start rot_end w_winter Numeric weight winter cover (default 0.25). w_spring Numeric weight spring cover (default 0.25). w_summer Numeric weight summer cover (default 0.25). w_fall Numeric weight fall cover (default 0.25).

title: Compute the SHMI Cover Pillar (Season‑Weighted Plant Presence) — compute_cover
text: data frame one row per MGT_combo single column: Cover — SHMI cover score (0–100)

title: Compute the SHMI Cover Pillar (Season‑Weighted Plant Presence) — compute_cover
text: algorithm proceeds four steps: Assign daily record season based calendar month. Sum plant‑days within season MGT_combo. Normalize seasonal totals one‑quarter rotation length. Apply seasonal weights scale final cover score 0–100. Days CD_name == "fallow" treated zero cover.

what: Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_disturbance
title: Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_disturbance
text: Calculates SHMI disturbance pillar management unit (`MGT_combo`) using mechanistic soil-mixing model based mixing efficiency tillage depth. Disturbance computed *annual* scale averaged across rotation. final inverse-disturbance score scaled 0–100.

title: Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_disturbance
Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_disturbance
text: daily_dist daily disturbance table produced prepare_shmi_inputs(), containing: MGT_combo — management unit identifier date — calendar date SD_mixeff — mixing efficiency (0–1) SD_depth_cm — tillage depth cm (already capped 30) rot_bounds data frame rotation bounds management unit, containing: MGT_combo rot_start rot_end

title: Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_disturbance
text: data frame : MGT_combo InvDist — inverse disturbance score (0–100)

title: Compute Mechanistic Inverse Disturbance (Mixing-Efficiency × Depth Metric) — compute_disturbance
text: Disturbance computed using mechanistic soil-mixing model: Depth normalization:     Tillage depth converted cm capped 30 cm. Annual ordering:     Within year, disturbance events ordered depth mixing     efficiency. Cumulative mechanical energy:     $$ ME_i = SD\_mixeff_i \times SD\_depth\_cm_i $$     $$ cumME_i = \sum_{j < } ME_j $$ Profile penetration (T_t):     $$ T_{t,} = SD\_mixeff_i \times \max(0, SD\_depth\_cm_i - cumME_i) $$     $$ T_{t,}^{norm} = T_{t,} / 30 $$ Annual disturbance:     $$ T_t^{annual} = \sum_i T_{t,}^{norm} $$ Inverse disturbance:     $$ T_t^{inv} = 1 - T_t^{annual} $$ Rotation average:     Annual inverse disturbance averaged across rotation years     scaled 0–100. management unit disturbance events, inverse disturbance defined 100 (disturbance).

what: Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers) — compute_diversity
title: Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers) — compute_diversity
text: Calculates SHMI diversity pillar management unit (`MGT_combo`) using daily crop presence data harmonized crop windows. Diversity computed *rotation scale* expanding species mixtures, summing plant-days across years, applying Hill-number diversity metrics entropy form (Shannon Simpson). final diversity score scaled 0–100 using user-specified theoretical maximum.

title: Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers) — compute_diversity
Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers) — compute_diversity
text: crop_harmonized data frame produced prepare_shmi_inputs(), containing one row per crop event harmonized start/end dates mixture names. daily daily data frame prepare_shmi_inputs(), containing: MGT_combo — management unit identifier date — calendar date CD_seq_num — crop sequence number CD_name — crop mixture name crop_present — 1 crop present, 0 otherwise hill Hill-number order. Supported values: 0: species richness 1: Shannon entropy 2: Simpson entropy (entropy form) Default 2. max_div theoretical maximum diversity used scaling final index 0–100. richness (hill = 0), maximum number species. entropy-based metrics, scaling uses log(max_div).

title: Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers) — compute_diversity
text: data frame : MGT_combo Diversity — rotation-scale diversity score (0–100)

title: Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers) — compute_diversity
text: algorithm proceeds four stages: Daily plant-days: Sum daily crop presence     MGT_combo × CD_seq_num × CD_name × year. Mixture expansion:     Mixtures "+ B" split individual species.     Placeholder mixtures like "3-species" expanded     species_1, species_2, species_3. Rotation-scale plant-days:     Plant-days summed across years rotation species. Entropy-based diversity:     Species proportions \(p_i\) computed diversity calculated : Richness: \(D = \sum (p_i > 0)\) Shannon entropy: \(D = -\sum p_i \log p_i\) Simpson entropy: \(D = -\log \sum p_i^2\) result capped max_div scaled 0–100.

what: Compute the Organic Inputs Pillar (Amendments + Animals) — compute_orginput
title: Compute the Organic Inputs Pillar (Amendments + Animals) — compute_orginput
text: Calculates SHMI organic-inputs indicator management unit (`MGT_combo`) combining amendment events animal events across rotation. year rotation assigned weighted organic-input presence based user-specified weights amendments animals. final score scaled 0–100.

title: Compute the Organic Inputs Pillar (Amendments + Animals) — compute_orginput
Compute the Organic Inputs Pillar (Amendments + Animals) — compute_orginput
text: rot_bounds data frame prepare_shmi_inputs() containing rotation-year bounds management unit, columns: MGT_combo rot_start_yr rot_end_yr amend data frame amendment events (Amendment_Diversity sheet), containing: MGT_combo SA_date — amendment date SA_cat — amendment category (e.g., "Organic") rows SA_cat == "Organic" contribute index. animal data frame animal events (Animal_Diversity sheet), containing: MGT_combo AD_start_date — start animal presence w_amend Numeric weight applied amendment events (default 1). w_animal Numeric weight applied animal events (default 1).

title: Compute the Organic Inputs Pillar (Amendments + Animals) — compute_orginput
text: data frame : MGT_combo events_per_year — weighted organic-input frequency Animals — final SHMI organic-input score (0–100)

title: Compute the Organic Inputs Pillar (Amendments + Animals) — compute_orginput
text: algorithm proceeds six steps: Rotation-year grid:     MGT_combo, construct sequence years     rot_start_yr rot_end_yr. Amendment events:     Identify years organic amendments mark     amend_present = 1. Animal events:     Identify years animal presence mark     ani_present = 1. Weighted presence:     year rotation:     $$ \text{weighted\_input} = w_{\text{amend}} \cdot \text{amend\_present}            + w_{\text{animal}} \cdot \text{ani\_present} $$ Rotation-average:     Weighted inputs summed across rotation divided number     rotation years. Scaling:     rotation-average rescaled 0–100 using     scales::rescale().

title: Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers) — compute_rot_diversity

Diversity computed *rotation scale* expanding species mixtures, summing plant-days across years, applying Hill-number diversity metrics entropy form (Shannon Simpson). final diversity score scaled 0–100 using user-specified theoretical maximum.

text: crop_harmonized data frame produced prepare_shmi_inputs(), containing one row per crop event harmonized start/end dates mixture names. daily daily data frame prepare_shmi_inputs(), containing: MGT_combo — management unit identifier date — calendar date CD_seq_num — crop sequence number CD_name — crop mixture name crop_present — 1 crop present, 0 otherwise hill Hill-number order. Supported values: 0: species richness 1: Shannon entropy 2: Simpson entropy (entropy form) Default 2. max_div theoretical maximum diversity used scaling final index 0–100. richness (hill = 0), maximum number species. entropy-based metrics, scaling uses log(max_div).

title: Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers) — compute_rot_diversity
text: data frame : MGT_combo Diversity — rotation-scale diversity score (0–100)

title: Compute Rotation-Scale Crop Diversity (Entropy-Based Hill Numbers) — compute_rot_diversity
text: algorithm proceeds four stages: Daily plant-days: Sum daily crop presence     MGT_combo × CD_seq_num × CD_name × year. Mixture expansion:     Mixtures "+ B" split individual species.     Placeholder mixtures like "3-species" expanded     species_1, species_2, species_3. Rotation-scale plant-days:     Plant-days summed across years rotation species. Entropy-based diversity:     Species proportions \(p_i\) computed diversity calculated : Richness: \(D = \sum (p_i > 0)\) Shannon entropy: \(D = -\sum p_i \log p_i\) Simpson entropy: \(D = -\log \sum p_i^2\) result capped max_div scaled 0–100.

what: Prepare and Validate SHMI Input Data from an Excel Workbook — prepare_shmi_inputs
title: Prepare and Validate SHMI Input Data from an Excel Workbook — prepare_shmi_inputs
text: Reads, validates, harmonizes, expands input sheets required compute Soil Health Management Index (SHMI). function official entry point SHMI data preparation produces standardized list objects used directly build_shmi().

title: Prepare and Validate SHMI Input Data from an Excel Workbook — prepare_shmi_inputs
code: prepare_shmi_inputs(   path,   exclude = NULL,   verbose = TRUE,   start_date_override = NULL,   end_date_override = NULL )

title: Prepare and Validate SHMI Input Data from an Excel Workbook — prepare_shmi_inputs
text: path Path SHMI Excel workbook. Must contain standard SHMI sheets: Mgt_Unit, Crop_Diversity, Soil_Disturbance, Amendment_Diversity, Animal_Diversity. Sheets may empty; empty sheets safely ignored. exclude Optional character vector MGT_combo identifiers exclude processing. Default NULL. verbose Logical; TRUE (default), prints progress messages describing sheet ingestion, validation steps, grid construction. start_date_override Optional Date date‑coercible value. supplied, crop, disturbance, amendment, animal events occurring date removed, rotation bounds clipped accordingly. end_date_override Optional Date date‑coercible value. supplied, events occurring date removed, rotation bounds clipped accordingly.

title: Prepare and Validate SHMI Input Data from an Excel Workbook — prepare_shmi_inputs

title: Prepare and Validate SHMI Input Data from an Excel Workbook — prepare_shmi_inputs
text: function performs: robust Excel ingestion sheet‑level validation management‑unit filtering crop‑level biological validation (chronology, annual/perennial rules) harmonization crop windows across mixtures construction rotation bounds daily grid expansion (fast vectorized implementation) mechanistic daily disturbance processing (mixing efficiency × depth) assembly amendment animal event tables function enforces biologically realistic crop windows, including: annual crops must terminate within year perennials may span years must follow valid chronology mixtures collapsed event‑level windows Rotation bounds computed available event types (crop, disturbance, amendment, animal). Empty sheets contribute bounds. Daily grids generated using fully vectorized expansion, ensuring extremely fast performance even large datasets. Additionally, function automatically performs front‑end validation Excel input file using validate_excel_input(). validator checks required sheets, required columns, valid date formats, consistent MGT_combo values, malformed entries ingestion harmonization occurs. validation fails, execution stops immediately clear, actionable error messages. Users must correct Excel file re‑running prepare_shmi_inputs().

what: SHMI: Soil Health Management Index — SHMI
title: SHMI: Soil Health Management Index — SHMI
text: **SHMI** package provides complete, reproducible workflow computing Soil Health Management Index (SHMI) standardized Excel workbooks. SHMI composite indicator integrating four management pillars:

title: SHMI: Soil Health Management Index — SHMI
text: Cover — seasonal plant presence Diversity — rotation-scale crop diversity (Hill numbers) Inverse Disturbance — mechanistic mixing-efficiency × depth metric Organic Inputs — amendments animal presence package includes: robust input validation harmonization biologically realistic crop-window processing fast vectorized daily-grid construction mechanistic disturbance modeling rotation-scale aggregation official national SHMI settings (locked mode) expert-mode overrides research scenario analysis

title: SHMI: Soil Health Management Index — SHMI
text: complete SHMI workflow consists : Prepare inputs     prepare_shmi_inputs()     Reads validates Excel workbook, harmonizes crop windows,     constructs rotation bounds, generates daily grids. Compute SHMI     build_shmi()     Computes four pillars combines final SHMI score. Interpret results     returned object includes pillar scores, final SHMI values,     settings used, timestamp reproducibility.

title: SHMI: Soil Health Management Index — SHMI
text: default, SHMI computed using official national settings (locked mode). Setting expert_mode = TRUE allows users override weights parameters, resulting SHMI values comparable national SHMI scale.

title: SHMI: Soil Health Management Index — SHMI
text: SHMI outputs include: shmi_version — version SHMI algorithm timestamp — computation time settings_used — full list settings applied

title: SHMI: Soil Health Management Index — SHMI
text: prepare_shmi_inputs — read, validate, harmonize inputs build_shmi — compute SHMI scores compute_cover — cover pillar compute_diversity — diversity pillar compute_disturbance — inverse disturbance pillar compute_orginput — organic inputs pillar

title: Validate SHMI Input Tables — validate_shmi_input
text: function enforces SHMI input integrity checking: Presence required tables columns. missing `MGT_combo` values. date columns class `Date`. Rotation boundaries valid (`rot_start` ≤ `rot_end`). duplicated `(MGT_combo, date)` rows daily table. `crop_present` contains 0, 1, `NA`. Basic dataset diagnostics (fields, years, species richness, mixtures).

title: Validate SHMI Input Tables — validate_shmi_input
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ dat <- prepare_shmi_inputs("path/to/input/folder") val <- validate_shmi_input(dat) if (!val$ok) stop("Validation failed:\n", paste(val$errors, collapse = "\n")) print(val$summary) } # }
